title: Fire Conditions Bulletins - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Fire Conditions Bulletins 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON AND WASHINGTON WILDFIRE INFORMATION OREGON WILDFIRE RESPONSE AND RECOVERY WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about current wildfires and air quality. Offers a resource directory for wildfire preparation, response, and recovery. Includes evacuation information and a sign-up for emergency alerts through OR-Alert. Provides a list of verified organizations collecting donations for people impacted by wildfire. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
